title: Senior CNC Operator
description: Seeking experienced CNC operator proficient in G-code programming and machine operation. Must have hands-on experience with Fanuc and Haas CNC machines. Responsibilities include setting up machines, programming, quality control, and preventive maintenance. Knowledge of precision measurement tools and blueprint reading is essential.
requirements: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent. NIMS certification preferred. Experience with CAM software.

title: CNC Programmer
description: Looking for skilled CNC programmer with expertise in CAM software and G-code programming. Must be proficient in creating and optimizing toolpaths, selecting appropriate cutting tools, and ensuring quality standards. Experience with multi-axis machining and complex part programming required.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering preferred. Mastercam certification a plus.

title: CNC Lathe Operator
description: Experienced CNC lathe operator needed for precision turning operations. Must be skilled in operating CNC lathes, reading technical drawings, and performing quality checks. Knowledge of turning operations, tool selection, and dimensional inspection required.
requirements: ITI in Machinist trade or equivalent experience. Knowledge of measuring instruments.

title: CNC Maintenance Specialist
description: Seeking skilled maintenance specialist for CNC machines. Responsibilities include preventive maintenance, troubleshooting electrical and mechanical issues, and ensuring optimal machine performance. Must have experience with Fanuc controls and servo systems.
requirements: Diploma in Mechanical/Electrical Engineering. Fanuc certification preferred.

title: Skilled Welder
description: Expert welder needed for custom metal fabrication. Must be proficient in MIG, TIG, and arc welding techniques. Experience with aluminum and stainless steel welding required. Knowledge of blueprint reading and welding symbols essential.
requirements: AWS certification preferred. Experience with various metal types and thicknesses.

title: Textile Machine Operator
description: Experienced textile machine operator needed for modern textile manufacturing facility. Must be skilled in operating and maintaining textile machinery, including jacquard and handloom operations. Knowledge of fabric quality control and pattern design required.
requirements: ITI in Textile Manufacturing or equivalent experience. Knowledge of modern textile machinery.

title: Accounts Executive
description: Seeking experienced accounts executive for handling financial operations. Must be proficient in accounting software, payroll processing, and financial reporting. Knowledge of tax regulations and account reconciliation required.
requirements: B.Com or M.Com degree. Knowledge of accounting software and tax regulations.

title: Assembly Line Operator
description: Assembly line operator needed for automotive components manufacturing. Must be experienced in quality inspection and tool handling. Knowledge of lean manufacturing principles and safety protocols required. Experience with precision assembly and quality control essential.
requirements: ITI in relevant trade. Knowledge of automotive assembly processes.

title: MIG & TIG Welder
description: Welder required for MIG and TIG welding on automotive structures.

title: Arc Welder
description: Arc welding specialist for precision steel fabrication.

title: Jacquard Machine Operator
description: Operator required for Jacquard machine operations with experience in pattern design.

title: Handloom Supervisor
description: Supervising handloom operations and ensuring fabric quality standards.

title: Pattern Designer
description: Pattern designer needed for customized Jacquard handloom textiles.

title: Accounts Executive
description: Accounts executive needed for payroll and ledger management.

title: Payroll Officer
description: Payroll officer to manage salaries and employee reimbursements.

title: Assembly Line Operator
description: Experienced assembly line operator needed for high-volume auto parts manufacturing.

title: Quality Inspector (Assembly)
description: Inspector required to ensure quality in assembly processes for automotive components.

title: CNC Programmer - Advanced Manufacturing
description: Looking for an experienced CNC Programmer to join our advanced manufacturing team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for programming and optimizing CNC machines for complex parts production. Must have strong knowledge of G-code programming, CAM software, and quality control procedures.
requirements: B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent. CNC Programming certification preferred. Experience with 5-axis machining.

title: Welding Operator Specialist
description: Seeking skilled welding operator for precision metal fabrication. Must be proficient in multiple welding techniques including MIG, TIG, and arc welding. Experience with aluminum and stainless steel welding required. Knowledge of welding symbols and blueprint reading essential.
requirements: ITI in Welding. AWS certification preferred. Experience with various metal types and thicknesses.

title: Textile Designer - Handloom & Jacquard
description: Looking for creative textile designer specializing in handloom and jacquard designs. Must have expertise in traditional and contemporary pattern development, color theory, and textile construction. Knowledge of CAD software for textile design required.
requirements: Degree in Textile Design. Experience with jacquard design software. Knowledge of traditional Indian textiles.

title: Accounts Executive - Payroll Specialist
description: Seeking experienced accounts executive specializing in payroll processing and management. Responsibilities include managing end-to-end payroll process, statutory compliance, and employee benefits administration. Must be proficient in payroll software and tax regulations.
requirements: B.Com/M.Com in Accounting. Knowledge of labor laws and payroll compliance. Certification in payroll management preferred.

title: Mechanical Assembly Operator (ELE)
description: Looking for skilled mechanical assembly operator for electronic component assembly. Must have experience in precision assembly, quality inspection, and working with small components. Knowledge of electronic assembly processes and ESD protocols required.
requirements: ITI in Electronics/Mechanical. Experience in electronic manufacturing. Knowledge of IPC standards preferred.

title: Senior CNC Machine Operator
description: Operate and maintain CNC machines for precision parts manufacturing. Responsible for setup, programming, and quality control.
requirements: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering, CNC certification required

title: VMC Operator
description: Operating Vertical Machining Centers for complex part production. Setup, programming, and quality inspection required.
requirements: ITI in Machinist trade, VMC operation certification preferred

title: CNC Turning Specialist
description: Specialized in CNC turning operations for automotive components. Experience with complex turning operations required.
requirements: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering, Experience with Fanuc controls

title: CNC Milling Expert
description: Expert level CNC milling operations for precision components. Advanced programming and setup skills required.
requirements: B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering, Advanced CNC certification

title: CNC Setup Technician
description: Responsible for setting up CNC machines, tool management, and initial programming for production runs.
requirements: ITI in Mechanical, Experience with various CNC machines

title: Production Supervisor - CNC
description: Supervise CNC production team, manage schedules, and ensure quality standards are met.
requirements: B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering, Supervisory experience required

title: CNC Maintenance Engineer
description: Maintain and repair CNC machines, troubleshoot issues, and perform preventive maintenance.
requirements: Diploma/B.Tech in Mechanical/Electrical, CNC maintenance certification

title: Quality Inspector - CNC
description: Inspect CNC manufactured parts, maintain quality records, and ensure compliance with specifications.
requirements: Diploma in Quality Control, Knowledge of CMM

title: CNC Programmer - Aerospace
description: Program CNC machines for aerospace components, optimize toolpaths, and ensure precision.
requirements: B.Tech in Mechanical, Aerospace manufacturing experience

title: Tool Room Technician
description: Manage tool room operations, maintain cutting tools, and support CNC operations.
requirements: ITI in Tool Room, Experience with CNC tooling

title: Production Planner - CNC
description: Plan and schedule CNC production, manage resources, and optimize production flow.
requirements: B.Tech in Production/Mechanical, Planning experience required

title: CNC Trainer
description: Train operators and programmers in CNC operations, programming, and maintenance.
requirements: B.Tech in Mechanical, Training certification preferred

title: Process Engineer - CNC
description: Develop and optimize CNC manufacturing processes, implement improvements, and ensure efficiency.
requirements: B.Tech in Mechanical/Production, Six Sigma certification preferred

title: CAM Programmer
description: Create and optimize CNC programs using CAM software, develop toolpaths, and support production.
requirements: B.Tech in Mechanical, CAM software certification

title: Quality Manager - CNC
description: Manage quality control systems for CNC operations, ensure compliance, and implement improvements.
requirements: B.Tech in Mechanical, Quality Management certification
